
  // Type_any
  public class Type_any {
    var type_type : Type_type?
    var generic_any : Generic_any?
    var type_const : Type_const?
    var type_msgblock : Type_msgblock?
    var type_delta : Type_delta?
    var refcount : Int = 0
    var backref : AnyObject? = nil
    public init() {}
  }
  // Generic_any_type
  public class Generic_any_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
  }
  // v_any_constructor
  public static func v_any_constructor(
  ) -> Type_any {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_any()
  }
  // v_any_create
  public static func v_any_create(
  ) -> Type_any {
    var output : Type_any = v_any_constructor()
    v_any_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_any_register
  public static func v_any_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_any_startup_type()
    v_any_startup_empty()
    return t_any
  }
  // v_any_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_any_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_any
  ) {
    value.backref = nil
    if let type_msgblock : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = value.type_msgblock {
      value.type_msgblock = nil
      Vx_Core.v_release_any(type_msgblock.type_any)
    }
    if let type_const : Vx_Core.Type_const = value.type_const {
      value.type_const = nil
      Vx_Core.v_const_shutdown(type_const)
    }
    if let generic_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any = value.generic_any {
      value.generic_any = nil
      generic_any.v_shutdown()
    }
    if let type_list : Vx_Core.Type_list = value.p_type_list() {
      type_list.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
      if let generic_list : Vx_Core.Generic_list = type_map.generic_list {
        type_list.generic_list = nil
      }
      value.type_list = nil
    }
    if let type_map : Vx_Core.Type_map = value.p_type_map() {
      type_map.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
      if let generic_map : Vx_Core.Generic_map = type_map.generic_map {
        generic_map.listkeyn = []
        type_map.generic_map = nil
      }
      value.generic_map = nil
    }
    if let type_struct : Vx_Core.Type_struct = value.p_type_struct() {
      type_struct.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
      if let generic_struct : Vx_Core.Generic_struct = type_map.generic_struct {
        generic_struct.listkeyn = []
        type_map.generic_struct = nil
      }
      type_struct.generic_struct = nil
      value.generic_struct = nil
    }
    value.type_type = nil
    Vx_Core.v_global_release()
  }
  // v_any_startup - mutating
  public static func v_any_startup(
    _ value : Type_any
  ) {
    value.generic_any = e_generic_any
  }
  // v_any_startup_empty
  public static func v_any_startup_empty() {
    v_any_startup(e_any)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_any,
      e_any
    )
  }
  // v_any_startup_type
  public static func v_any_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_any
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/any")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.e_string
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_any_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_any
  public static func v_any_from_any(
    _ type_type : Type_type,
    _ type_any : Type_any
  ) -> Type_any {
    let generic_type : Generic_type = v_generic_type_from_type(type_type)
    let output : Type_any = generic_type.p_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
    return output
  }
  // v_copy
  public static func v_copy(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Type_any {
    let type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_from_any(type_any)
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = v_generic_type_from_type(type_type)
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = generic_type.p_copy(type_any, anylist)
    return output
  }
  // v_empty_from_any
  public static func v_empty_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Type_any {
    let type_type : Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_from_any(type_any)
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.v_empty(type_type)
    return output
  }
  // v_new
  public static func v_new(
    _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Type_any {
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = v_generic_type_from_type(type_type)
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = generic_type.p_new(type_type, anylist)
    return output
  }
  // v_release_any
  public static func v_release_any(
    _ type_any : Type_any
  ) {
    type_any.refcount -= 1
    if type_any.refcount <= 0 {
      if type_any.refcount < 0 {
        v_log_string(
          "Error: Negative Refcount - " +
          v_typenamen_from_any(type_any)
        )
      }
      v_any_shutdown(type_any)
    }
  }
  // v_release_listany
  public static func v_release_listany(
    _ listany : [Type_any]
  ) {
    for type_any : Type_any in listany {
      v_release_any(type_any)
    }
  }
  // v_release_listany_except
  public static func v_release_listany_except(
    _ listany : [Type_any],
    _ except_any : Type_any
  ) {
    for type_any : Type_any in listany {
      if type_any !== except_any {
        v_release_any(type_any)
      }
    }
  }
  // v_reserve_any
  public static func v_reserve_any(
    _ type_any : Type_any
  ) {
    type_any.refcount += 1
  }
  // v_reserve_listany
  public static func v_reserve_listany(
    _ listany : [Type_any]
  ) {
    for type_any : Type_any in listany {
      v_reserve_any(type_any)
    }
  }
  public static let t_any : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.Type_type()
  public static let e_any : Type_any = Type_any()
